title: AIREP profile: chain_witness (freshness / head witness) v0.1
description: Closes the structural gaps the neutral core leaves OPEN (THREAT_MODEL.md): tail-truncation, replay-as-latest, and 'is this the current head?'. The core binds each record only to its immediate predecessor (relative binding); this profile adds an ABSOLUTE binding — a stable chain_id and a signed head witness (length + head hash) produced by a key DISTINCT from the producer — plus a freshness anchor. With it, dropping the last N records is detectable (the witnessed length exceeds the presented chain) and a stale-but-valid head fails the freshness check. CRITICAL HONESTY: a witness signed by the PRODUCER's own key provides NO truncation defense (the producer could self-truncate and re-witness); the witness key MUST be independent of the producer, or this profile provides no guarantee. It is the additional check AIREP-Trusted requires (CONFORMANCE_CLASSES.md). Attaches under profiles.chain_witness; never changes the core; carries no personal data.

chain_id.description: A stable, absolute identifier for this chain — the binding the core lacks. The same chain_id MUST NOT be reused across logically distinct chains, so a record cannot be spliced into a different chain even if its relative previous-link happens to match.

head.description: The witnessed claim of the chain's true tail at witness time.

length.description: Total number of records in the chain at witness time. A presented chain shorter than this length has been truncated.

witness.description: A signature over the head claim by a witness key INDEPENDENT of the producer key. A producer-signed witness is theater and does NOT satisfy AIREP-Trusted.

witness_id.description: Identifier of the witness key/authority. MUST be distinct from the record's producer/signing key.

value.description: Signature over the canonical form of {chain_id, head.decision_index, head.current, head.length}.

inclusion_proof.description: ALTERNATIVE to (or alongside) a direct witness signature: an append-only transparency-log inclusion proof anchoring head.current. Reuses the key_trust.transparency_log shape so AIREP can mount onto an existing Sigstore/Rekor-style log rather than reinventing one.

proof.description: Proof that head.current is included in the log at leaf_index.

freshness.description: Maps a VALID record to a CURRENT one. At least one of these SHOULD be present, or 'valid' cannot be read as 'current'.

witness_timestamp_utc.description: When the witness signed the head.

nonce.description: A challenge nonce the verifier supplied, proving the witness is not a replay.

challenge_response.description: Response to a verifier-issued freshness challenge.

revocation_checked.description: True if the verifier confirmed neither the producer key nor the witness key is revoked as of the freshness time (see the key_trust profile's revocation block).
